reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Spacious area for a break during your journey. Clean restrooms and options for food.

reviews.comment:
Figura adherida a las promos con MODO, pero no tienen el QR y te hacen pagar con el de la app YPF con el cual no te hacen los reintegros.

(Translated by Google)
Figure attached to the MODO promotions, but they don't have the QR code and they make you pay with the one from the YPF app, which doesn't give you refunds.

reviews.comment:
Odian a los perros en ese lugar. Tengan cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
They hate dogs in that place. Be careful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmMk1yUmNREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Viajé solo con mi perro, llegué a esa ypf con sed y hambre, entro con él a upa y no me quisieron vender ( mi perro es un salchicha mini, entra en una mano). Les dije que solo compraba y me iba y me dijeron que NO, que dejara al perro en el auto con el calor que hace. Son unos insensibles y discriminadores. Si tienen perros no vayan!!!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I traveled alone with my dog. I arrived at that YPF restaurant thirsty and hungry. I carried him in my arms, and they wouldn't sell me anything (my dog ​​is a mini dachshund, he fits in one hand). I told them I was just going to buy something and leave, and they said NO, that I should leave the dog in the car in the heat. They're insensitive and discriminatory. If you have dogs, don't go!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmcUp2dkl3EAE
